product.info_delivery: Your package will arrive at your pick-up location or conveniently at your home within 3-5 working days.
product.product_exchange_info: Doesn't it quite fit? No problem – we'll exchange your product for a new one.
product.return_info: Simply return your product and we'll refund your money. No questions asked – we'll do our best to ensure your return goes smoothly.
